title: Phireworks
description: Allows you to create large and randomized firework shows
body:
Phireworks allows you to create large and randomized firework shows without having to painfully craft insane amounts of random fireworks.

The phireworks block can be activated by right clicking it or with redstone.
When activated, it launches a firework with random speed, height, colors, explosions, etc.
